title: Ember's Edge: The Darkening of Aldenmoor
description: A full story arc spanning five acts. A corrupted dragon egg has been stolen from the vault of the Archmage Valdris, and dark forces are converging to use it in a ritual that would shatter the boundary between the mortal realm and the Abyss. Only a band of bold adventurers can stop the demon lord Zytharax from crossing over.

acts.name: Shadows Over Aldenmoor
acts.description: The city of Aldenmoor is gripped by fear. Bandits and wolves patrol the roads, and rumours speak of the Archmage's vault being breached. Investigate the city outskirts and uncover the first threads of the conspiracy.

encounters.name: Bandit Toll on the King's Road
encounters.description: Armed bandits demand tribute. Defeating them reveals a note bearing the symbol of a demon cult.

encounters.name: Captain Malgrave's Crew
encounters.description: The bandit captain guards a hidden camp containing stolen documents.

encounters.name: Wolves of the Darkwood
encounters.description: Unusually aggressive wolves — corrupted by residual demonic energy — attack at night.

objectives.description: Reach the King's Road checkpoint outside Aldenmoor
Clear the bandit toll on the King's Road
Defeat Captain Malgrave and break the camp's command
Recover the wanted poster and patrol notes from the camp
Report the road threat to Aldenmoor's gate captain

acts.name: The Archmage's Tower
acts.description: The documents lead to Archmage Valdris's tower, now overrun with elementals and the undead, bound to protect the secret of what was stolen. Ascend the tower, defeat the guardians, and uncover the truth about the dragon egg.

encounters.name: Elemental Guardians of the Gate
encounters.description: Fire and earth elementals patrol the tower entrance, bound by the Archmage's ward.

encounters.name: Undead Scholars
encounters.description: The Archmage's apprentices, animated as wights, guard the library floor.

encounters.name: The Archmage's Last Stand
encounters.description: Valdris himself, now possessed by a demonic fragment, attacks the party at the summit. A powerful spellcaster encounter.

objectives.description: Enter the ruined Archmage's tower
Defeat the tower's fire guardian
Clear the library floor of wights
Confront and defeat the possessed Archmage
Recover Valdris's spellbook from the summit
Speak with the archivist's lingering echo about the theft

acts.name: The Spider Queen's Labyrinth
acts.description: A dark elf cultist has fled into the caverns beneath Aldenmoor, where phase spiders and the undead serve as guardians. The party must navigate the labyrinth and recover the crimson seal — one of three keys to the demon ritual.

encounters.name: Spider Ambush in the Dark
encounters.description: Giant and phase spiders spring from the cavern walls.

encounters.name: Plague Zombies of the Old Crypt
encounters.description: An old dwarven crypt beneath the labyrinth, filled with plague zombies.

encounters.name: The Medusa Gatekeeper
encounters.description: A medusa guards the final chamber, petrifying those who meet her gaze. Use mirrors and clever tactics.

objectives.description: Enter the Spider Queen's labyrinth
Break the spider ambush by slaying the phase spider leader
Clear the plague crypt of its shambling dead
Defeat the medusa guarding the inner chamber
Recover the Crimson Seal from the undercrypt

acts.name: The Dragon's Lair
acts.description: The corrupted dragon egg is being held in the lair of a young dragon, manipulated by the cult. The party must confront the dragon, recover the egg, and face a giant-guarded mountain pass to reach the ritual site.

encounters.name: Frost Giant Sentinels
encounters.description: Frost giants block the mountain pass, bound to the cult by dark contracts.

encounters.name: Stone Giant Boulder Trap
encounters.description: Stone giants trigger an avalanche; defeat them to prevent the passage from being sealed.

encounters.name: The Young Dragon Kharyx
encounters.description: The young dragon Kharyx, mind-twisted by the cult's corruption, attacks on sight. A major boss fight.

objectives.description: Reach the mountain pass beneath the dragon's peak
Clear the frost giant sentinels from the pass
Defeat the stone giant blocking the high trail
Defeat Kharyx and break the cult's hold over the lair
Recover the corrupted dragon egg from the lair

acts.name: The Abyssal Gate
acts.description: The final confrontation. The demon lord Zytharax is nearly through the Abyssal Gate, powered by the stolen rituals. The party faces vampire spawn, a mind flayer controller, and finally the demon lord himself. The fate of Aldenmoor — and the world — hangs in the balance.

encounters.name: Vampire Spawn Honour Guard
encounters.description: Vampire spawn guard the ritual chamber entrance, feeding on captured villagers.

encounters.name: The Mind Flayer Ritualist
encounters.description: A mind flayer orchestrates the final ritual, using psionic attacks to incapacitate party members.

encounters.name: Zytharax, Demon Lord of the Abyss
encounters.description: The demon lord emerges, partially manifested through the gate. A legendary final boss encounter.

objectives.description: Enter the ritual chamber beneath Aldenmoor
Defeat the vampire spawn honour guard
Destroy the mind flayer ritualist controlling the gate
Reach the Abyssal Gate dais before the breach stabilizes
Defeat Zytharax and end the incursion

acts.name: Siege of Ironhold
acts.description: The fortress-city of Ironhold is under siege by an army of orcs and giants. Break through enemy lines, sabotage their siege engines, and rally the garrison to mount a counter-attack.

encounters.name: Orc Vanguard at the Gates
encounters.description: Orc warriors have breached the outer walls and are streaming into the courtyard.

encounters.name: Hill Giant Siege Crew
encounters.description: Hill giants operate massive catapults. Destroy them before the inner keep falls.

encounters.name: The Hobgoblin War Chief
encounters.description: A hobgoblin captain commands the siege from a fortified position. Eliminating him will break the assault.

objectives.description: Reach the besieged fortress of Ironhold
Repel the orc vanguard from the courtyard
Defeat the hill giant siege crew
Defeat the hobgoblin war chief directing the siege
Rally the garrison commander for the counter-attack

acts.name: The Crown of Shadows
acts.description: Royal court intrigue draws you into a web of political assassination and betrayal. A shadow demon has infiltrated the king's court, possessing advisors one by one. Root out the demon before the kingdom falls to chaos.

encounters.name: Cultist Fanatics in the Catacombs
encounters.description: Beneath the palace, cultists perform dark rituals to empower the shadow demon.

encounters.name: The Shadow Demon Revealed
encounters.description: The shadow demon drops its disguise and attacks in the throne room.

objectives.description: Gain entry to the royal palace
Consult the royal spymaster about the infiltration
Clear the cultist cell beneath the palace
Destroy the shadow demon in the throne room
Recover the Crown of Shadows used to channel the demon

acts.name: The Dragon Hunt: Green Peril
acts.description: A young green dragon terrorizes the farming valleys, poisoning rivers and livestock. Track the beast to its swamp lair and put an end to its reign of toxic terror.

encounters.name: Poisoned Shambling Mound
encounters.description: Shambling mounds corrupted by the dragon's poison lurk in the wetlands.

encounters.name: The Green Dragon's Lair
encounters.description: The young green dragon awaits in its poison-mist lair, surrounded by toxic pools.

objectives.description: Track the dragon to its swamp lair
Clear the shambling mounds blocking the path
Slay the young green dragon
Report the dragon's defeat to the valley villagers
Harvest scales from the dragon's corpse

acts.name: The Lich's Spire
acts.description: An ancient lich has awakened in its tower north of the mountains, raising an undead army that threatens all living lands. Ascend the spire, break the phylactery wards, and confront the lich itself.

encounters.name: Death Knight Gatekeeper
encounters.description: A death knight guards the entrance to the lich's spire, commanding a squad of wraiths.

encounters.name: Mummy Chamber
encounters.description: Ancient mummies rise from their sarcophagi to protect the phylactery vault.

encounters.name: The Lich Lord
encounters.description: The lich awaits at the top of the spire, surrounded by necromantic energy.

objectives.description: Enter the Lich's Spire
Defeat the death knight gatekeeper
Clear the mummy guardians from the phylactery vault
Destroy the lich and shatter its phylactery
Collect the shattered phylactery fragments

acts.name: The Planar Gate of Xel'thor
acts.description: A rift to another plane has opened in the wastelands, spewing demons and aberrations into the world. Seal the gate before the planar incursion becomes unstoppable.

encounters.name: Demon Vanguard
encounters.description: Imps and a succubus lead the demon advance party through the rift.

encounters.name: The Beholder Guardian
encounters.description: A beholder has been drawn through the rift and now guards the gate's nexus point.

encounters.name: Pit Fiend Gatekeeper
encounters.description: A pit fiend holds the gate open from the other side. Defeat it to collapse the rift.

objectives.description: Reach the planar rift in the wastelands
Destroy the demon vanguard
Defeat the beholder guardian at the nexus
Destroy the pit fiend and collapse the gate
Collect planar essences from the closing rift

acts.name: The Dark Forest of Whispers
acts.description: An ancient forest has been corrupted by a green hag coven. Twisted trees attack travelers, and the hags plot to spread their curse across the realm. Navigate the haunted woods and destroy the coven.

encounters.name: Treant Sentinels
encounters.description: Corrupted treants block the forest paths, attacking anything that moves.

encounters.name: Werewolf Pack
encounters.description: Werewolves cursed by the hags hunt through the moonlit forest.

encounters.name: The Green Hag Coven
encounters.description: Three green hags perform a ritual of corruption at the forest's heart.

objectives.description: Enter the Dark Forest of Whispers
Clear the corrupted treant sentinels
Defeat the werewolf pack
Destroy the green hag coven
Gather rare herbs from the purified forest

acts.name: The Underwater Temple of Thalassar
acts.description: A sunken temple beneath the Sapphire Coast holds an artifact of immense power. Sahuagin priestesses and their minions guard the depths. Dive into the abyss to claim the artifact before the enemy does.

encounters.name: Sahuagin Patrol
encounters.description: Sahuagin priestesses patrol the temple approach, commanding water elementals.

encounters.name: The Black Pudding Depths
encounters.description: A massive black pudding fills the lower corridors, dissolving everything it touches.

encounters.name: The Yuan-ti Priest
encounters.description: A yuan-ti abomination has taken control of the temple's inner sanctum.

objectives.description: Reach the sunken temple of Thalassar
Defeat the sahuagin temple guards
Destroy the black puddings in the lower corridors
Defeat the yuan-ti abomination in the sanctum
Retrieve the artifact from the temple altar

acts.name: The Volcanic Forge of Ignis
acts.description: Deep within an active volcano lies the legendary Forge of Ignis, where the most powerful weapons were once created. Fire giants guard the approach, and a fire giant warrior commands the forge itself.

encounters.name: Fire Giant Patrol
encounters.description: Fire giant warriors patrol the volcanic tunnels leading to the forge.

encounters.name: Elemental Furnace
encounters.description: Fire elementals swarm from the forge's molten furnace.

encounters.name: The Iron Golem Smith
encounters.description: An iron golem, the forge's eternal smith, attacks any who approach the central anvil.

objectives.description: Enter the volcanic tunnels
Defeat the fire giant patrol
Clear the fire elementals from the furnace room
Defeat the iron golem smith
Collect mithral ingots from the forge stockpile

acts.name: The Sky Citadel of the Storm King
acts.description: A floating citadel above the clouds is home to a storm giant and its court. The giant holds a key to sealing the planar breaches. Ascend through the cloud layer and negotiate or fight your way to the key.

encounters.name: Cloud Gargoyles
encounters.description: Chimeras circle the citadel's lower platforms, attacking anyone who approaches.

encounters.name: Stone Golem Sentries
encounters.description: Stone golems guard the citadel's inner gates.

encounters.name: The Storm Giant's Challenge
encounters.description: The storm giant challenges you to prove your worth before granting the key.

objectives.description: Reach the sky citadel above the clouds
Defeat the chimeras guarding the approach
Defeat the stone golem sentries
Accept and survive the storm giant's challenge
Collect the planar seal key

acts.name: Descent into the Shadow Realm
acts.description: The boundary between the mortal realm and the Shadowfell has weakened. Vampires, ghosts, and banshees pour through the breach. Enter the Shadow Realm to find and destroy the anchor holding the rift open.

encounters.name: Vampire Court
encounters.description: A vampire lord and its spawn control the shadow crossing.

encounters.name: Banshee's Wail
encounters.description: Banshees haunt the shadow corridors, their wails draining life force.

encounters.name: The Shadow Anchor
encounters.description: A mind flayer maintains the shadow anchor, feeding on the psychic energy of the rift.

objectives.description: Cross into the Shadow Realm
Defeat the vampire lord at the crossing
Silence the banshees in the shadow corridors
Destroy the mind flayer maintaining the shadow anchor
Collect shadow crystal shards from the collapsed anchor

acts.name: The Dragon Hunt: Red Fury
acts.description: A young red dragon has claimed a mountain stronghold and demands tribute from nearby towns. Unlike the green dragon, this beast must be confronted directly in its burning lair.

encounters.name: Kobold Warband
encounters.description: Kobold servants of the dragon patrol the mountain trail with fire traps.

encounters.name: Manticore Guardians
encounters.description: Manticores nest on the cliff ledges, raining spikes on climbers.

encounters.name: The Young Red Dragon
encounters.description: The young red dragon breathes fire from its hoard-filled lair.

objectives.description: Ascend the mountain to the dragon's lair
Clear the warband from the mountain trail
Defeat the manticore guardians on the cliffs
Slay the young red dragon
Claim treasure from the dragon's hoard

acts.name: The Drow Incursion
acts.description: Drow elite warriors have surfaced from the Underdark, establishing a beachhead in the caverns beneath the eastern provinces. Their goal is to capture surface-dwellers for their slave pens. Put an end to the incursion.

encounters.name: Drow Ambush Party
encounters.description: Drow elite warriors ambush the party at a cavern intersection.

encounters.name: Phase Spider Scouts
encounters.description: Phase spiders serve as the drow's scouts, phasing through walls to attack.

encounters.name: The Drow Commander
encounters.description: A drow commander leads the incursion from a fortified cavern camp.

objectives.description: Enter the Underdark caverns
Survive the drow ambush party
Eliminate the phase spider scouts
Defeat the drow commander and end the incursion
Free the captured surface-dwellers

acts.name: The Gnoll Warfront
acts.description: Gnoll packmasters have united the gnoll tribes into a marauding army. Bugbear chiefs serve as their heavy shock troops. Defeat the warlord coalition before they overrun the border settlements.

encounters.name: Gnoll Raiding Party
encounters.description: A gnoll packmaster leads a raiding party against a border village.

encounters.name: Bugbear Shock Troops
encounters.description: Bugbear chiefs lead the heavy assault on the defensive line.

encounters.name: The Gnoll Warlord
encounters.description: The gnoll warlord commands from a fortified war camp.

objectives.description: Reach the besieged border settlement
Defeat the gnoll raiding party
Defeat the bugbear shock troops
Defeat the gnoll warlord and break the coalition
Report the victory to the border commander

acts.name: The Elder Evil: Basilisk Depths
acts.description: Beneath the shattered mountains, an ancient basilisk and its chimera offspring guard the entrance to the Elder Evil's prison. This penultimate challenge tests all your skills before the final confrontation.

encounters.name: Chimera Nest
encounters.description: Chimeras have nested in the cavern entrance, breathing fire and swooping from above.

encounters.name: The Ancient Basilisk
encounters.description: An enormous basilisk guards the passage to the deepest chamber. Its gaze turns flesh to stone.

encounters.name: Iron Golem Warden
encounters.description: An iron golem, placed here millennia ago, serves as the final lock on the Elder Evil's prison.

objectives.description: Enter the basilisk depths beneath the mountains
Clear the chimera nest at the entrance
Defeat the basilisk guardians
Defeat the iron golem warden
Retrieve the warden's seal key

acts.name: The Final Confrontation: The Adult Red Dragon
acts.description: The ultimate threat reveals itself: an adult red dragon, corrupted by abyssal energy, threatens to consume the world in fire. All allies rally for one last stand against the most powerful foe you have ever faced.

encounters.name: Fire Giant Honor Guard
encounters.description: Fire giant warriors serve as the dragon's honor guard at the caldera entrance.

encounters.name: Frost Giant Defectors
encounters.description: Frost giants, enslaved by the dragon, must be defeated or freed.

encounters.name: The Adult Red Dragon
encounters.description: The corrupted adult red dragon fights with apocalyptic fury atop its volcanic throne.

objectives.description: Reach the volcanic caldera of the final battle
Defeat the fire giant honor guard
Defeat or free the enslaved frost giants
Slay the adult red dragon and save the realm
Claim the dragon's legendary hoard
